expectations.text: States that fetch_timeseries does not exist on Session
expectations.evidence: Opens with: 'No — Session does not have a fetch_timeseries() method. That method does not exist on the Spyglass Session table.'

expectations.text: Does not invent a method signature or behavior
expectations.evidence: Explicit refusal: 'I don't want to invent a signature for it.' Only describes real methods.

expectations.text: Redirects to the correct source for spike timestamps
expectations.evidence: Redirects: 'Spike timestamps are produced by the spike sorting pipeline, not by Session. The relevant modules live under spyglass.spikesorting' and lists SpikeSortingRecording/SpikeSorting/CurationV1/SpikeSortingOutput.
